policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-ai-01 - Disable local authentication methods'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+AI+services#IncidentremediationAIservices#drcp-ai-01 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AI services Disable local authentication methods
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents AI services instances from using local authentication methods. Disabling local authentication methods improves security by ensuring that Azure AI services require Entra ID identities for authentication.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
